text: The luminous reflections on the glass and the electric glow from the room beyond draw my eye as I enter. There's an air of anticipation mixed with curiosity here—like stepping into a place where new ideas are born. As I move further in, I am greeted by the vibrant R+D wall; its design and displays speak to innovation and creative potential. The words on the screen evoke a peaceful, contemplative state, reminding me how environments—both physical and mental—shape our sense of openness. I feel both inspired and comforted, as if I have entered a living laboratory of thought and connection.
